---
title: "Power BI Assignment"
description: "Group analytics project using Microsoft Power BI to analyse GlobalMart Ltd performance, profitability, sectors, and sales reps."
author: "Esha Esha"
date: "2025-11-11"
image: ../../images/powerbi.jpg
categories: [Analytics, Power BI, Dashboard, Data Visualisation]
---

## Project Overview

This university group project used **Microsoft Power BI** to analyse GlobalMart Ltd transactional business data over a multi year period.

The objective was to identify insights related to:

- Profitability trends  
- Sector performance  
- Sales representative effectiveness  
- Revenue patterns  
- Cost efficiency  

---

## Tools Used

- Microsoft Power BI  
- DAX Measures  
- Data Cleaning  
- Dashboard Design  
- Business Reporting  

---

## Key Findings

- Education sector was most profitable  
- Agriculture sector underperformed  
- Discount strategy reduced margins  
- Sales rep performance varied strongly  
- Profit linked more to margin than volume  

---

## My Contribution

- Dashboard development  
- Data analysis  
- Report writing  
- Insight generation  
- Team collaboration  

---

## Business Value

This project improved my skills in business intelligence, dashboard storytelling, KPI design, and converting raw data into strategic decisions.
